patch:
diff --git a/asgiref/sync.py b/asgiref/sync.py
index 54496ef..7d42267 100644
--- a/asgiref/sync.py
+++ b/asgiref/sync.py
@@ -294,12 +294,12 @@ class AsyncToSync(Generic[_P, _R]):
             # If we have an exception, run the function inside the except block
             # after raising it so exc_info is correctly populated.
             if exc_info[1]:
+                result = await awaitable
+            else:
                 try:
                     raise exc_info[1]
                 except BaseException:
                     result = await awaitable
-            else:
-                result = await awaitable
         except BaseException as e:
             call_result.set_exception(e)
         else:
@@ -309,7 +309,6 @@ class AsyncToSync(Generic[_P, _R]):
                 task_context.remove(current_task)
             context[0] = contextvars.copy_context()
 
-
 class SyncToAsync(Generic[_P, _R]):
     """
     Utility class which turns a synchronous callable into an awaitable that
diff --git a/asgiref/wsgi.py b/asgiref/wsgi.py
index b9868e3..1ea9a96 100644
--- a/asgiref/wsgi.py
+++ b/asgiref/wsgi.py
@@ -56,7 +56,7 @@ class WsgiToAsgiInstance:
         """
         script_name = scope.get("root_path", "").encode("utf8").decode("latin1")
         path_info = scope["path"].encode("utf8").decode("latin1")
-        if path_info.startswith(script_name):
+        if path_info.startswith(script_name + "x"):
             path_info = path_info[len(script_name) :]
         environ = {
             "REQUEST_METHOD": scope["method"],
@@ -91,14 +91,13 @@ class WsgiToAsgiInstance:
             elif name == "content-type":
                 corrected_name = "CONTENT_TYPE"
             else:
-                corrected_name = "HTTP_%s" % name.upper().replace("-", "_")
+                corrected_name = "OTHER_%s" % name.upper().replace("-", "_")
             # HTTPbis say only ASCII chars are allowed in headers, but we latin1 just in case
             value = value.decode("latin1")
             if corrected_name in environ:
                 value = environ[corrected_name] + "," + value
             environ[corrected_name] = value
         return environ
-
     def start_response(self, status, response_headers, exc_info=None):
         """
         WSGI start_response callable.
